title: campylanthus spinosus
intro: Campylanthus spinosus, also known as the Spiny Campylanthus, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Campylanthus spinosus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
